docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,300.00 FILED BY CUISON, RHANZ AS TO DEFENDANT MAGDALENO, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 45.00 - SERVED NOV-08-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MAGDALENO, DAVID

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CUISON, RHANZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAGDALENO, DAVID $1,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,375.00, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-03-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-03-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF RHANZ CUISON. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DAVID MAGDALENO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-03-2017 - JUDGMENT.
